heading: Administrative Assistant
label: 9018 Administrative Assistant
text: The Secretary of the Air Force may appoint an Administrative Assistant in the Office of the Secretary of the Air Force. The Administrative Assistant shall perform such duties as the Secretary may prescribe.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 8018 of this title
